transcript.clean_text: after a year's absence the amstel gold race in its 55th edition was back with a shortened course on a new parkour 12 laps of 16.9 kilometers including the climbs of the golemaburg the bemela berg and the cowberg before a shortened final lap admitting the cowberg but finishing as normal in berg m to light 38 climbs over this distance meant an intense race 10 riders went away early on and enjoyed a lead of around four minutes the bunch being led by the kerning quickstep motherstar and jumbo visma but we had a guest on route tom demouland taking a break from the sport lives locally in maastrid good to see him out on the route but early on there was a crash with around 53 k's to go there was a crash that took down bob jungle's sonder army and maury a van severnance amongst others and this was the point that the racing really started to hot up several moves going clear tosh van der sand here also with flyon cenochel sonny colbrelli and also in the mix there dylan funball but the chase was on borah hansgrove had missed it as had the israel startup nation and eventually the break that had dominated the day were caught but the bunch were chasing hard behind being led by primozaroglich also there alejandro valverde and tom pidcock who took victory in upgrade like ligand was the sole leader he'd been out in front all day long the final survivor from that breakaway but with 26 k's to go the pace was very high behind we had another attack at ida shelling went clear for borah hansgreh catching two of the previous riders from the breakaway but his tenure out in front was not to last too long the final ascent of the cowberg saw problems for primos roglic who suffered a mechanical at the most inopportune moment but there are attacks up front from julian alaphilippe who went clear taking with him tom pidcock michael matthews and bernard but he faded over the top of the climb and an elite group of riders went clear including three from the ineos grenadiers kwikovsky karapaz were there shachman michael matthews also in the mix but look at the damage behind the last rider across to this group was alejandro valverde only a week away from his 41st birthday former winner mikhail kwiakovsky then went clear but meanwhile alaphilippe was dropping back starting to struggle under the load of this difficult race then tom pidcock went clear as soon as kyokovsky was caught tom peacock surged clear in the form of his life at the moment and he drew with him and also max shachman and the three were soon to open up a lead that would take them in to the finish the chase behind being led by the is rail startup nation and a bunch that was reduced to only around 40 riders with one kilometer to go coming in to the finish it was tom peacock who led things chapman there in second position and with only just under 200 meters to go it was vannart who opened up the sprints surging clear opening up a small gap on tom pig shackman was distance with about 75 meters ago pig tried to come around the dutchman lunged at the line so close difficult to call the bunch sprint being led home there by michael and matthews but in the end the photo finished revealed that it was bernard who took the win but just look how close that was an absolutely nail-biting scintillating finale there it was that close so eventually it was delight for walt van ark look at the smile on his face after disappointment in blabanza pyle it was victory in amsterdam gold van art takes the win ahead of peacock shackman matthews valverde alaphilippes bragley mohrich kwikovsky and tosh van der sander rounding out the top ten it was fist bumps on the podium and flowers again two classic wins this year to wild barnard to add to his win at game of webwome and another absolutely vintage edition of the amstel gold race next up flesh will on and the age bast on the age you
